parameters.jsCode:
const d = $json.data;
const body = {
  range: 'prospects!A:AE',
  majorDimension: 'ROWS',
  values: [[
    d.leadId || ('L-' + Date.now()),
    new Date().toISOString(),
    d.empresa || '',
    d.nicho || '',
    d.ciudad || '',
    d.pais || '',
    d.direccion || '',
    d.telefono || '',
    d.email || '',
    d.web || '',
    d.emailContacto || d.email || '',
    d.whatsapp || '',
    d.instagram || '',
    d.facebook || '',
    d.linkedin || '',
    d.googleMaps || '',
    d.ratingGoogle != null ? d.ratingGoogle : '',
    d.numResenas != null ? d.numResenas : '',
    d.pageSpeedMovil != null ? d.pageSpeedMovil : '',
    d.pageSpeedDesktop != null ? d.pageSpeedDesktop : '',
    d.tieneSSL != null ? d.tieneSSL : '',
    d.diagnosticoIA || '',
    d.score != null ? d.score : '',
    d.fuente || 'Manual CRM',
    d.notas || '',
    d.screenshotUrl || '',
    '', '', '', '', ''
  ]]
};
return [{ json: { leadId: d.leadId, body } }];
return [{ json: { ok: true } }];
